mapper.select: /* SysConnectKpnMapper.getKpnApiInfo */ SELECT API_NO , API_INFO , ORGN_CD , API_URL , ACCESS_TOKEN , SECRET_KEY , ETC02 AS USNO , ETC03 AS INTG_CER_TKN , ETC04 AS INTG_CER_TKN_PBLC_DATE , ETC05 AS INTG_CER_TKN_PBLC_TIME , ETC06 AS INTG_CER_TKN_DDL_DATE , ETC07 AS INTG_CER_TKN_DDL_TIME FROM TB_CM_API_LINK_INFO WHERE API_NO = #{apiNo} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
